allow: PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Host "killed $proc" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; cd C:\\Users\\MAA\\Desktop\\trading-app\\backend; .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe main.py)
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'cd C:\\Users\\MAA\\Desktop\\trading-app\\frontend; npm run dev' -WindowStyle Normal)
PowerShell(cd C:\\Users\\MAA\\Desktop\\trading-app\\frontend; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'npm run dev' -WindowStyle Normal)
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173' -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — frontend responding OK" } catch { "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($gitPaths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\git.exe","C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe","C:\\Git\\bin\\git.exe"\); foreach \($p in $gitPaths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "Found: $p"; break } })

PowerShell($folder = "$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop\\trading-data"; if \(Test-Path $folder\) { Get-ChildItem $folder -Recurse -File | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 5 FullName, LastWriteTime } else { Write-Host "trading-data folder does not exist" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $ws = New-Object System.Net.WebSockets.ClientWebSocket; $uri = [System.Uri]"ws://localhost:8765"; $ct = [System.Threading.CancellationToken]::None; $task = $ws.ConnectAsync\($uri, $ct\); $task.Wait\(3000\) | Out-Null; if \($ws.State -eq 'Open'\) { Write-Host "WS connected OK — state: $\($ws.State\)"; $ws.CloseAsync\([System.Net.WebSockets.WebSocketCloseStatus]::NormalClosure, '', $ct\).Wait\(1000\) | Out-Null } else { Write-Host "WS state: $\($ws.State\)" } } catch { Write-Host "WS test error: $_" })
